flows: start -> utente creato ? — type=transition; label=""; explanation="start of the process"
utente creato ? -> home — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if user is created, go to home"
utente creato ? -> creazione utente — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if user is not created, create user"
creazione utente -> creazione corretta? — type=transition; label=""; explanation="after user creation, check if it is correct"
creazione corretta? -> home — type=transition; label="si"; explanation="if creation is correct, go to home"
creazione corretta? -> creazione utente — type=transition; label="no"; explanation="if creation is not correct, create user again"
flow 1: start -> utente creato ? (si) -> home
flow 2: start -> utente creato ? (no) -> creazione utente -> creazione corretta? (si) -> home
flow 3: start -> utente creato ? (no) -> creazione utente -> creazione corretta? (no) -> creazione utente
the diagram models a user access process.
the process starts and checks if a user is already created.
if a user is not created, the system attempts to create one, and then checks if the creation was successful.
if the creation is not successful, the process loops back to the creation step.
if a user is already created or the creation is successful, the process proceeds to the home page.
home -> accesso alla creazione? — type=control flow; label="si"; explanation="go to access check"
accesso alla creazione? -> creazione commissione? — type=control flow; label="si"; explanation="go to commission creation check"
accesso alla creazione? -> no — type=control flow; label="no"; explanation="go to no"
creazione commissione? -> creazione commissione — type=control flow; label="si"; explanation="go to commission creation"
creazione commissione? -> creazione offerta? — type=control flow; label="no"; explanation="go to offer creation check"
creazione commissione -> creazione corretta? — type=control flow; label="si"; explanation="go to correct creation check"
creazione corretta? -> no — type=control flow; label="no"; explanation="go to no"
creazione offerta? -> creazione offerta — type=control flow; label="si"; explanation="go to offer creation"
creazione offerta -> creazione corretta? — type=control flow; label="si"; explanation="go to correct creation check"
no -> no — type=control flow; label="no"; explanation="end"
flow 1: home -> accesso alla creazione? (si) -> creazione commissione? (si) -> creazione commissione -> creazione corretta? (si) -> no
flow 2: home -> accesso alla creazione? (si) -> creazione commissione? (no) -> creazione offerta? (si) -> creazione offerta -> creazione corretta? (si) -> no
flow 3: home -> accesso alla creazione? (no) -> no
the diagram models a process flow for creation, potentially of a commission or an offer.
the flow starts at "home" and branches based on access checks and creation checks.
the process involves checking if creation is correct, and if not, it ends.
the diagram shows two possible paths: creating a commission or creating an offer.
the diagram ends with a "no" state, indicating a failure or termination point.
home -> accesso ad "menu"? — type=control_flow; label=""; explanation="flow to check menu access"
accesso ad "menu"? -> home — type=control_flow; label="no"; explanation="return to home if no access"
accesso ad "menu"? -> accesso a profilo? — type=control_flow; label="si"; explanation="flow to check profile access if access to menu"
accesso a profilo? -> informazioni profilo — type=control_flow; label="si"; explanation="flow to display profile information if access to profile"
accesso a profilo? -> accesso a guida? — type=control_flow; label="no"; explanation="flow to check guide access if no access to profile"
accesso a guida? -> guida — type=control_flow; label="si"; explanation="flow to display guide if access to guide"
accesso a guida? -> home — type=control_flow; label="no"; explanation="return to home if no access to guide"
flow 1: home -> accesso ad "menu"? (si) -> accesso a profilo? (si) -> informazioni profilo
flow 2: home -> accesso ad "menu"? (si) -> accesso a profilo? (no) -> accesso a guida? (si) -> guida
flow 3: home -> accesso ad "menu"? (no) -> home
flow 4: home -> accesso ad "menu"? (si) -> accesso a profilo? (no) -> accesso a guida? (no) -> home
the diagram models a menu navigation flow within an application.
the flow starts at the "home" screen and branches based on user access to the menu, profile, and guide.
if the user has access to the menu, the flow checks for profile access; otherwise, it returns to the home screen.
if the user does not have profile access, the flow checks for guide access; otherwise, it returns to the home screen.
the diagram shows a hierarchical structure where access to deeper features depends on previous access checks.
validations: accesso ad "menu"? : si -> accesso a profilo?; no -> home
accesso a profilo?: si -> informazioni profilo; no -> accesso a guida?
accesso a guida?: si -> guida; no -> home
